name: Google Cloud Platform
description: GCP 云平台:Cloud Run、GKE、BigQuery 与 IAM

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['gcp','cloud_run','gke','bigquery','gcp_iam'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(\bgcp\b|google cloud|cloud run|\bgke\b|bigquery|gcs bucket|cloud functions|gcloud|service account|workload identity)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
